# ml_models directory
# This directory stores pre-trained ML model files generated by train_models.py
#
# Files created after running `python train_models.py`:
#   - rf_traffic_model.pkl         Random Forest traffic classifier
#   - rf_feature_importances.json  Feature importance percentages
#   - lstm_forecast_model.pkl      MLP forecaster (LSTM substitute)
#   - scaler.pkl                   StandardScaler for forecast features
#
# Run the training script before starting the server:
#   python train_models.py
